division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
chapter_title: Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title

markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 10. Registration of Trailer Coaches [5350 - 5354]
##### § 5351

Sections 4452, 4604, 5904, 6052, and 9254, and subdivision (a) of Section 9552 do not apply to the registration or renewal of registration of any trailer coach.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: Sections 4452, 4604, 5904, 6052, and 9254, and subdivision (a) of Section 9552 do not apply to the registration or renewal of registration of any trailer coach.
